description: Bounded autonomous QA/playtest swarm plan for the Collect-and-Exit demo. Each worker replays a deterministic input route against the runtime, captures world-state/performance/event evidence, and records a classified verdict. The swarm never auto-fixes, auto-applies, or mutates source.

policy.boundary: Evidence-only QA; failures are classified and reported, never auto-fixed or applied.

routes.description: Hold right to collect the key and reach the exit.
Stay idle; the win must remain gated (objective blocked).
Hold right with the hazard drone armed past the key; contact must end the run.

boundary: Source-like bounded QA swarm plan only. Evidence is generated locally and untracked; the swarm performs no auto-fix, auto-apply, source mutation, trusted browser write, command execution, network access, production/native/store export, or full Godot parity/replacement claim.
